task_description: Second deep-dive round on LODGING (capsule hotels, business hotels, internet/manga cafes, love hotels), specifically to find genuinely NEW entries not already in the dataset and to fix a known noise problem: the existing dataset includes one entry that is NOT actually lodging at all (a pachinko parlor included only as a landmark reference), which should not have been in a lodging list -- do not repeat this mistake; every entry in your output must be an actual place a visitor could stay or rest overnight. STRICT SCOPE: only report locations physically within Kabukicho 1-chome or 2-chome (Shinjuku-ku), roughly bounded by Yasukuni-dori (south), Shokuan-dori (north), Meiji-dori (east), and the Seibu-Shinjuku/Odakyu area (west). Existing 15 entries already covered (do not duplicate, check by real-world identity/address, not exact string; note one of these 15, the pachinko parlor, is the noise example above and should NOT be treated as a model for what counts as lodging): ブース ネットカフェ&カプセル, 新宿区役所前カプセルホテル, マルハン パチンコ店(目印・宿泊施設ではありません、宿泊施設として数えない), カプセルホテル新宿510, グリーンプラザ新宿, ELE Cabin 新宿歌舞伎町, アパホテル新宿歌舞伎町タワー, アパホテル新宿歌舞伎町中央, 東横イン東京新宿歌舞伎町, 快活CLUB 新宿歌舞伎町店, グランサイバーカフェ Bagus 新宿(歌舞伎町), ゲラゲラ 新宿マンガ喫茶, ホテル モアナ新宿(アダルト専用), HOTEL & SPA J-MEX 新宿歌舞伎町(アダルト専用), HOTEL Perrier(アダルト専用). Search for: additional capsule hotels, business hotels, internet/manga cafes, and licensed love hotels within the strict boundary not yet listed. Each entry needs: name, precise lat/lng within the stated boundary (cite source), description, tags from {shower_available, no_shower, price_band_budget, price_band_mid, 24h, overnight_friendly}, reliability_score (1-5), source_type, type (official/unofficial), gray_zone_note (e.g. internet cafe stays are not Hotel Business Act licensed lodging), licensed_as. Do not fabricate -- if genuinely fewer than 5-8 new, distinct, in-boundary, non-duplicate, actually-lodging locations exist, report fewer with an explicit note. Read-only research output only.
next_action: Review the handoff and, if approved, continue through the existing execution flow.
